NIKE MIND USER GUIDE

Property of: Nike Mind Science Dept.

Be sure to view thoroughly before wearing the new Nike Mind: A MIND-ALTERING SHOE.

Nike Mind activates your senses to enhance your pregame routine. 

For cricket captain @shubmangill, that means staying grounded so his teammates can count on him. 

Available now. Link in bio.

node.text: They think they can rise to greatness without facing rejection. But they keep finding out. #JustDoIt

“My dream is to make this world a running world.” -@kipchogeeliud 

The new Eliud Kipchoge Collection. Inspired by Kenya and those who power his relentless devotion to running.

When the world chose not to believe, India chose the trophy.

@jemimahrodrigues, @radhay21, and @smriti_mandhana are Champions for the first time ever, on home soil.

@kipchogeeliud proves that no human is limited. Not by doubt. Not by distance. And never by time. 

Greatness doesn’t ask if there’s a finish line. It asks: where do we run next?
